name: Frontend shim cleanup and ownership normalization
description: Remove redundant frontend compatibility shims left after feat-062, normalize canonical feature ownership for budgets/expenses/households-related paths, and eliminate duplicate old import paths.

evidence.description: Approved design for removing legacy frontend shim paths and normalizing canonical feature ownership.
Design docs index links the shim cleanup proposal.
ExecPlan defines the three cleanup batches, pre-delete impact checks, and final verification path for feat-063.
Plans index records feat-063 as completed.
Progress log records both the approved shim-cleanup direction and the completed cleanup/verification session.
Final full repository verification passed after deleting legacy shim trees and rewiring canonical feature-first imports.
Final GitNexus change detection reported MEDIUM risk with 52 changed symbols, 26 changed files, and 1 affected process (`ExpensesPage -> LocalDateToTimestamp`) after the cleanup and harness updates.
